context_filter-placeholder: Filter by Tablet Id/Cell Id/Pivot key/State/Host...
context_filter-tooltip: To find the tablet serving a key, enter key values as an array: [value] or [value, value]. The closing bracket is optional. Use the u suffix for uint64 values, for example [553402322211286528u]. Other input filters tablets by Tablet ID, Cell ID, State, or Host.
